The '''Z65 patrol droid''' was a successor to the [[501-Z police droid]], used around [[137 ABY]]. It was designed to offer security and protection to anyone who could afford it. Unlike the 501-Z, it had simplified programming structure and reduced combat capabilities, but was significantly cheaper, allowing one to build an effective security force without hiring living individuals. They had large, red-hued frames and a [[Blaster cannon/Legends|blaster cannon]] built-in to each arm, unlike the 501-Z, which had hands with fingers.<ref name="LECG" />

Criminals, particularly crime lords, tended to use the Z65 model.<ref name="LECG" /> An [[Advozse/Legends|Advozse]] named [[Brogar]] used several Z65s as enforcers in [[Brogar's Safe House and Cantina|his cantina]] on [[Lok/Legends|Lok]] around [[137 ABY]].<ref name="SWL02" />
